mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC
SELECT er.*, u.real_name as studentName FROM exam_record er LEFT JOIN user u ON er.student_id = u.id ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC
SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT * FROM exam_record WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_record(exam_id, student_id, score, submit_time) VALUES(#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{score}, NOW())
